_note:
RESEARCH 2026-04-24: Parent declares `refs.child: Component>` — Svelte 5's `Component

` is a callable-constructor signature, NOT an instance shape. `bind:this={refs.child}` assigns the component INSTANCE; the instance shape (`__SvnInstance

` on our side, `SvelteComponent & Exports & { $$bindings: B }` upstream) doesn't have a call signature. So `instance = refs.child` should fire TS2322. Verified: - Our overlay fires TS2322 at `Parent.svelte.svn.ts(19,13)`. - Upstream svelte-check --tsgo ALSO fires: `Parent.svelte 12:30 Type 'SvelteComponent<{ label?... }> & { $$bindings?: string }' is not assignable to type 'Component<... & { $$events?... }, {}, string> | undefined'.` So the error IS real. We assert `clean: true` here because the diagnostic is currently DROPPED by our mapper (the `bind:this` LHS has no TokenMapEntry), and surfacing it requires bundled shim-shape work so `__SvnInstance

` matches upstream's structural compatibility — otherwise surfacing over-fires on bench files (Chart.svelte / Pala.svelte) where upstream's broader instance shape silently passes. Tracked in OPEN.md under 'Component bind:this target type mismatch'. Update this fixture to `errors: [{file:Parent.svelte, line:11, column:29, code:2322}]` once the shim shape is broadened + TokenMapEntry added.
